name: C001.2a: Poisson bracket {q,p} = 1
detail: Canonical Poisson bracket is 1 by definition

name: C001.3: Schrödinger equation expressible in SymPy
C001.inv: Quantization preserves Lie algebra structure
detail: Poisson bracket and commutator both satisfy Jacobi identity + bilinearity

name: C002.3: Legendre transform gives H = T + V
C003.1: Gibbs → Boltzmann for equiprobable states
C003.2: Shannon = Gibbs / (k_B ln 2) — structural equivalence
detail: H = S/(k_B ln 2). The logarithmic measure of uncertainty is preserved; physical units stripped.

name: PRIM.1: QUANTIZE = MAP + EXTEND
detail: MAP: {,}→(1/iħ)[,] is Lie algebra homomorphism. EXTEND: phase space → Hilbert space adds ∞-dim structure. CAVEAT: ordering ambiguity (Weyl/normal) not captured by this decomposition.

name: PRIM.2: VARIATIONAL = EXTEND + REDUCE + LIMIT
detail: EXTEND: path→function space. REDUCE: select extremum. LIMIT: δ→0 in functional derivative. Clean decomposition.

name: PRIM.3: DISCRETIZE = REDUCE + BREAK_SYMMETRY
detail: REDUCE: continuous→finite. BREAK_SYMMETRY: continuous translation→discrete. CAVEAT: lattice gauge theory preserves gauge symmetry. Not universal.

name: PRIM.4: Analytic continuation = EXTEND + MAP?
detail: Analytic continuation is uniquely determined by the identity theorem. EXTEND captures domain enlargement but MAP doesn't capture the analyticity constraint that makes the extension unique. May need COMPLETE as an 11th primitive, or EXTEND with constraints.

name: PRIM.5: RENORMALIZATION = REDUCE + MAP + LIMIT
detail: REDUCE: integrate out high-energy modes. MAP: rescale. LIMIT: RG fixed point. Reasonable decomposition. NOTE: the 'reduction' step is specifically a path integral over a shell in momentum space.

name: PRIM.6: DUALIZE is involution
detail: Fourier: F²=reflection. Pontryagin: G^^≅G. Legendre: involution on convex functions. Not exact identity in all cases (Fourier picks up reflection) but structurally involutive.

name: PRIM.7: REPRESENT = MAP + LINEARIZE?
detail: Representation is a MAP (homomorphism G→GL(V)), but LINEARIZE implies approximation of a nonlinear object. Representation preserves exact structure. Better: REPRESENT = MAP to category of linear spaces. LINEARIZE should be reserved for actual approximation (Taylor, Jacobian).

name: NOETHER.1: dH/dt = 0 on-shell (energy conservation from time-translation)
NOETHER.2: dJ/dt = 0 for central force (angular momentum conservation)
